DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Extract all SQL Server schemas in scope.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Extract all SQL Server tables and views in scope.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Directory where the MetaSchema workspace will be created.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source system name recorded in the workspace.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Extract one SQL Server table or view.
